name: Ouster, Inc.
description: Ouster, Inc. is a leading provider of high-resolution digital lidar sensors and perception software designed to enable automation across various sectors. Founded in 2015, the company specializes in creating 3D vision solutions for industrial automation, smart infrastructure, robotics, and automotive applications. By leveraging its proprietary digital lidar technology, Ouster aims to improve safety, efficiency, and sustainability for autonomous machines and smart systems worldwide. Headquartered in San Francisco, California, the company continues to innovate in the field of sensing and perception to support the next industrial revolution.
